parameters: amount (number, required) — transfer amount in minor units
currency (string, required) — NGN, GHS, ZAR, KES, UGX, RWF, TZS, XOF, ZMW
country (string, required) — full country name e.g. 'South Africa'
reference (string, optional) — 16-100 alphanumeric chars, auto-generated if omitted
webhookUrl (string, optional) — custom webhook URL for this transfer
bankCode (string, conditional) — required for bank transfers, from bank list endpoint
accountNumber (string, conditional) — required for bank transfers
accountName (string, conditional) — required for ZAR, optional for KES
MNO (string, conditional) — required for mobile money: MTN, MPESA, AIRTEL, TIGO, VODAFONE
msisdn (string, conditional) — required for mobile money, phone with country code
recipientFirstName (string, optional) — required for XOF only
recipientLastName (string, optional) — required for XOF only
value.description: Send funds to customer/vendor bank account or mobile money. ZAR payouts via bank transfer only (bankCode + accountNumber + accountName required). Mobile money requires MNO + msisdn. Reference must be 16-100 alphanumeric chars. Daily limit: ~$500 equivalent.

parameters: reference (string, required) — transaction reference as path parameter
value.description: Retrieve transaction details by reference. Works for both transfers and collections. Returns full transaction object with status, amounts, fees, and recipient details.
Get wallet balances for all enabled collection currencies. Returns availableBalance (spendable) and ledgerBalance (total including pending).

parameters: title (string, required) — name/title of the payment link
currency (string, required) — USD, NGN, GHS, KES, ZAR
amount (number, required) — minor units (e.g. 300 NGN = 30000)
isFixedAmount (boolean, required) — true = exact amount; false = donation mode
type (string, required) — must be 'easy'
purpose (string, optional) — description on merchant dashboard
value.description: Create a shareable payment link. Supports fixed and donation amounts. Currencies: USD, NGN, GHS, KES, ZAR.

parameters: authorizationCode (string, required) — from initial transaction webhook or status endpoint
amount (number, required) — in original card currency minor units
reference (string, required) — unique reference for this charge
value.description: Charge a previously authorized card. Requires successful first charge via initialize endpoint. Min first charge: NGN 50.00 / GHS 0.10. Contact Startbutton team for feature activation. Webhook includes isRecurrent: true.

parameters: amount (number, required) — collection amount in minor units
currency (string, required) — NGN, GHS, KES, UGX, ZAR, RWF, TZS, XOF
reference (string, optional) — unique transaction reference
webhookUrl (string, optional) — custom webhook URL for this collection
value.description: Initialize a collection (inbound payment). Supports bank transfer and mobile money across supported currencies. Server-to-server integration.

value.description: Insufficient funds in wallet for transfer
value.recovery_action: Top up merchant wallet for the currency. Error message includes remaining balance.

value.description: Daily transfer limit exceeded (₦1,000,000 NGN or ~$500 equivalent)
value.recovery_action: Wait until next day or contact Startbutton to increase limit. Error includes remaining daily allowance.

value.description: Missing bankCode/accountNumber pair or MNO/msisdn pair
value.recovery_action: Provide either bankCode + accountNumber (bank transfer) or MNO + msisdn (mobile money)

value.description: Could not resolve account name from bank
value.recovery_action: Verify accountNumber and bankCode are correct. Not available for ZAR.

value.description: Transaction with this reference already exists (HTTP 409)
value.recovery_action: Use a unique reference per transaction. Check existing transaction status.

value.description: Reference must be 16-100 alphanumeric characters
value.recovery_action: Generate a reference string between 16 and 100 alphanumeric characters

value.description: Payment card has expired
value.recovery_action: Request updated card details from customer

value.description: Amount is invalid (negative, zero, or exceeds limits)
value.recovery_action: Validate amount before submission (integer minor units, positive, within provider limits)

value.description: API authentication failed (invalid or expired SECRET_KEY)
value.recovery_action: Verify SECRET_KEY from Dashboard Settings page is correct and active

value.description: Too many requests in time window
value.recovery_action: Implement exponential backoff and retry after Retry-After header value

value.description: Account name validation not available for ZAR transfers
value.recovery_action: Manually verify recipient details before sending ZAR transfers. accountName is required.

value.name: ZAR Bank Transfer Offramp
value.description: Offramp flow: crypto/digital → ZAR bank transfer. Requires bankCode, accountNumber, accountName. No account validation available for ZAR.

value.name: Mobile Money Offramp
value.description: Offramp via mobile money (GHS, KES, UGX, RWF, TZS, XOF, ZMW). Requires MNO and msisdn.

value.name: Transfer Reversal
value.description: Bank/operator reverses transfer. Funds auto-refunded to merchant wallet.

value.name: Transfer Failure
value.description: Transfer fails at processing stage. Check error reason.

value.name: Standard Authorization and Capture
value.description: Two-step payment flow - authorize then capture funds separately

value.name: Direct Capture
value.description: Single-step payment where authorization and capture happen atomically

value.name: Authorization and Void

value.name: Capture and Refund

value.name: Recurring Charge Flow
